description.value:
Your mottled flesh can shift color, granting you temporary, ever-shifting camouflage.

During your daily preparations, you can select a specific terrain from the following: arctic, desert, forest, mountain, plains, space, swamp, or urban. Your skin adopts a tone that could generally blend with such an environment. You become trained in Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in Stealth (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Shifthide Camouflage] action.
